input:
I went to see the Prophet in his mosque. When I greeted him, he asked me my name, and I said: “ʿAdiy ibn Ḥātim.” He then stood up and took me to his home. As we walked to his place, an elderly, weak woman stopped him. He stood with her for a long while as she explained what she wanted. I thought to myself: “He is certainly not a king.” He then took me into his rooms, gave me a cushion and said: “Sit on this.” I said: “No, you sit on it.” He said: “It is yours.” I sat down on the cushion and he sat on the floor.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 38: Men of Distinction

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 38: Men of Distinction

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 40s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe, off-white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by turban and subtle warm light.

characters.name: ʿAdiy ibn Ḥātim
characters.appearance: Late 20s, light brown skin, athletic build, strong facial features. Short beard, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Slightly stooped shoulders, kind eyes.

characters.name: Elderly Woman
characters.appearance: Older woman, frail, light grey hair tied under a simple cloth headscarf. Wearing a long, dark brown cloak, worn wooden clogs. Her face is not visible, only a faint outline of her body is visible.

output.moral_lesson: Humility is a great virtue, and it is a characteristic of those who are truly close to Allah.
output.narrative_text: When I greeted the Prophet in his mosque, he asked me my name and then took me to his home. An elderly woman stopped him and talked to him for a long time. I thought to myself that he was not a king, but a humble person.

compliance.notes: The Prophet is shown from behind, while the elderly woman is shown as a silhouette. The scene is warm and gentle, suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of a modest 7th century Makkah mud-brick mosque. The Prophet in white thobe and off-white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing with an elderly woman, her face not visible. A young man with light brown skin, short beard, off-white thobe and brown cloak, standing a little distance away, looking at the scene with curiosity. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
